zh.Ashford, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特阿福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Rev Peter Clerke於1291年出生在英國肯特阿福德時，他的父親Thomas Woodchurch Clerke25歲，母親Benedicta Shurt22歲。他於1315年與Countess Bennetta Church在英國肯特阿福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1368年在英國英格蘭肯特阿福德享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特奧爾平頓哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

zh-hans.Ashford, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特阿福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rev Peter Clerke于1291年出生在英国肯特阿福德时，他的父亲Thomas Woodchurch Clerke25岁，母亲Benedicta Shurt22岁。他于1315年与Countess Bennetta Church在英国肯特阿福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1368年在英国英格兰肯特阿福德享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特奧爾平頓哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Clerke
meanings: Anglo-Norman: Clerk, one who has received schooling

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Rev Peter Clerke was born in 1291, in Ashford, Kent, England, his father, Thomas Woodchurch Clerke, was 25 and his mother, Benedicta Shurt, was 22. He married Countess Bennetta Church in 1315, in Ashford, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1368, in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rev Peter Clerke est né en 1291, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Woodchurch Clerke, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Benedicta Shurt, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Countess Bennetta Church en 1315, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1368, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Countess Bennetta Church nel 1315, nel Ashford, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Rev Peter Clerkeが1291年にイギリスケントアシュフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Woodchurch Clerkeは25歳，母Benedicta Shurtは22歳であった。1315年にイギリスケントアシュフォードでCountess Bennetta Churchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1368年にイギリスイギリスケントアシュフォードで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントオルパントンアル サインツ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Churchyard, Woodchurch, Ashfo: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 르핀그턴 앨 세인츠 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Rev Peter Clerke(이)가 1291년 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Woodchurch Clerke(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Benedicta Shurt(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1315년 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 Countess Bennetta Church(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 르핀그턴 앨 세인츠 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

ru.All Saints Churchyard, Woodchurch, Ashfo: алл сеинц чурчярд, орпингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rev Peter Clerke родился в 1291 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Woodchurch Clerke было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Benedicta Shurt, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Bennetta Church в 1315 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1368 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц чурчярд, орпингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
